message.content:
@startuml

actor user
participant "Gstreamer Pipeline" as GP
participant "realsensesrc" as RS
participant "librealsense2" as LRS
participant "GStreamer" as GST

note left of user
load GSt
pipeline with
realsensesrc
end note

user -> GP : realsensesrc\nserial=728...

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

GP -> RS : create
create RS
RS -> RS : realsensesrc

RS -> LRS : rs2::context.query_devices()
RS <-- LRS : rs2::device_list
RS -> LRS : select device by serial
RS <-- LRS : rs2::sensor
note right : Select device

loop [for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)]
RS -> LRS : rs2::device.supports(info)
RS <-- LRS : bool
RS -> LRS : rs2::device.get_info(info)
RS <-- LRS : const char* info_string
RS -> RS : store info
end

RS -> GST : gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(...,infos, NULL)
note right
Register per-stream
metadata as
Gst tags
end note

RS -> LRS : rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
RS <-- LRS : std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>

loop [for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)]
RS -> RS : Create profile_list of supported profiles
end

RS -> GST : g_object_class_install_properties(......,options)
note right
Install all
supported
video profiles
as an option
end note

loop [for (option: rs2::rs2_option)]
RS -> LRS : rs2::sensor.supports(option)
RS <-- LRS : bool
RS -> LRS : rs2::sensor.get_option_range
RS <-- LRS : rs2::option_range
RS -> RS : store option
end

RS -> GST : g_object_class_install_properties(......,options)
note right
Install all
supported
RS camera options
as properties/options
end note

RS -> GST : gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...);
note right
Register callback
for parameter changes
end note

GP <-> RS : caps negotiation\n(CAPS)

note right of RS
- pixel_format
- width
- height
- framerate
end note

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING ==

GP -> RS : state=playing
RS -> LRS : rs2::sensor.start()

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

RS -> LRS : rs2::sensor.stop()

@enduml
